connections.def: from the same as 5482; a scratch or etching, i.e. stamp (as a badge of servitude), or scupltured figure (statue):--graven, mark. see GREEK for
of Latin origin; Marcus, a Christian:--Marcus,

connections.gloss: beward, be circumspect, take heed (to self), keep(-er, self), mark, look narrowly, observe, preserve, regard, reserve, save (self), sure, (that lay) wait (for), watch(-man).
consider, take heed, look at (on), mark
connections.def: from 4649; to take aim at (spy), i.e. (figuratively) regard:--consider, take heed, look at (on), mark. Compare 3700. see GREEK for 4649 see GREEK for
